description: The ParticleSpray component is a tool that shoots particles when the trigger is pulled.

fields.Rate: Ths rate at which the spray tip sprays at max (primary strength is raised to ``RateExp`` first before multiplying with this)
fields.RateExp: primary strength of the tool is raised to this number.
fields.MinSpeed: The min speed the particles travel at.
fields.MaxSpeed: The max speed the particles travel at.
fields.partSpeed: The min/max speed the particles travel at, is synced with ``MinSpeed`` and ``MaxSpeed``
fields.partEmitter: the Particle emitter this particle spray is controlling.
